title: Major Pharmaceutical Recall
description: A widely used medication is recalled after contamination reports.

B.title: Conduct targeted recall of affected batches

turns.speaker: economy
turns.text: A targeted recall minimizes economic disruption. It's the standard FDA approach.

turns.speaker: rights
turns.text: But targeted recalls risk missing hidden issues. Full transparency requires halting sales.

turns.speaker: security
turns.text: Halting sales protects lives. Contamination spreads fast.

turns.speaker: economy
turns.text: And halting sales creates shortages. Patients suffer either way.

turns.speaker: rights
turns.text: Shortages are temporary. Trust lost from secrecy lasts forever.

turns.speaker: security
turns.text: Trust doesn’t matter if people die from contaminated medicine.
